title: Pillow Filipino Fromage-Blanc Fried Rice
description: Indulgent Filipino fried rice featuring fromage-blanc, with a unique pillowy texture. Bitter notes from the tomatoes add depth to this dish.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-low heat.
Add diced onions and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add mixed veggies and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Pour in chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a separate pan, melt 1 tablespoon coconut oil over medium heat.
Pour in beaten eggs and cook until scrambled, about 2-3 minutes.
Add cooked egg mixture to the skillet with the onion mixture and stir to combine.
Fluff cooked jasmine rice with a fork and add to the skillet, stirring to combine with the onion-egg mixture.
Add diced tomatoes and stir to combine.
Scoop fromage-blanc into small balls and flatten slightly into patties.
Add fromage-blanc patties to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until lightly browned.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Stir-fry the mixture until combined and heated through.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter and shape into a pillow-like shape.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
Note: Fromage-blanc can be replaced with a mixture of 1 cup heavy cream and 2 tablespoons cornstarch, cooked over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened, about 5-7 minutes.
